name: memos
description: Self-hosted memos via MCP — create, read, search, reformat, archive, delete, and bulk-reorganize memos. Bundles the memos MCP server and two skills: `manage` (capture / TODO / single-memo cleanup) and `rearrange` (theme-grouped bulk reorganization).

memos_base_url.title: Memos instance URL
memos_base_url.description: Base URL of your memos instance, no trailing /api/v1 (e.g. http://host:5230)

memos_access_token.title: Memos access token
memos_access_token.description: Bearer PAT from Memos Settings -> Access Tokens

memos_auto_tag.title: Auto tag (optional)
memos_auto_tag.description: Tag automatically appended to every created memo (leave empty to disable)
